# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for a complete GCP application stack (Compute Engine, Cloud SQL, Cloud Storage, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure. Skip Cloud Logging and Monitoring configuration to reduce complexity in our initial MVP deployment.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

resources:
  - name: app-network
    type: compute.v1.network
    properties:
      autoCreateSubnetworks: true

  - name: app-firewall-ssh
    type: compute.v1.firewall
    properties:
      network: $(ref.app-network.selfLink)
      direction: INGRESS
      allowed:
        - IPProtocol: tcp
          ports: ["22"]
      sourceRanges:
        - 0.0.0.0/0
      targetTags:
        - app-instance

  - name: app-firewall-http
    type: compute.v1.firewall
    properties:
      network: $(ref.app-network.selfLink)
      direction: INGRESS
      allowed:
        - IPProtocol: tcp
          ports: ["80"]
        - IPProtocol: tcp
          ports: ["443"]
      sourceRanges:
        - 0.0.0.0/0
      targetTags:
        - app-instance

  - name: app-storage-bucket
    type: storage.v1.bucket
    properties:
      location: US
      storageClass: STANDARD
      versioning:
        enabled: true

  - name: app-sql-instance
    type: sqladmin.v1beta4.instance
    properties:
      region: us-central1
      databaseVersion: MYSQL_8_0
      settings:
        tier: db-f1-micro
        availabilityType: ZONAL
        backupConfiguration:
          enabled: true
          binaryLogEnabled: true
        dataDiskType: PD_SSD
        dataDiskSizeGb: 10
      rootPassword: $(ref.app-sql-root-password.value)

  - name: app-sql-root-password
    type: deploymentmanager.v2beta.typeProvider
    properties:
      description: Placeholder resource to satisfy template references
    metadata:
      dependsOn:
        - app-network

  - name: app-sql-database
    type: sqladmin.v1beta4.database
    properties:
      instance: $(ref.app-sql-instance.name)
      name: appdb

  - name: app-sql-user
    type: sqladmin.v1beta4.user
    properties:
      instance: $(ref.app-sql-instance.name)
      name: appuser
      password: ChangeMe123!

  - name: app-instance-template
    type: compute.v1.instanceTemplate
    properties:
      properties:
        machineType: e2-medium
        tags:
          items:
            - app-instance
        networkInterfaces:
          - network: $(ref.app-network.selfLink)
            accessConfigs:
              - name: External NAT
                type: ONE_TO_ONE_NAT
        disks:
          - boot: true
            autoDelete: true
            initializeParams:
              sourceImage: projects/debian-cloud/global/images/family/debian-12
        metadata:
          items:
            - key: startup-script
              value: |
                #!/bin/bash
                apt-get update
                apt-get install -y nginx
                systemctl enable nginx
                systemctl start nginx

  - name: app-health-check
    type: compute.v1.healthCheck
    properties:
      type: HTTP
      httpHealthCheck:
        port: 80
        requestPath: /

  - name: app-backend-service
    type: compute.v1.backendService
    properties:
      protocol: HTTP
      portName: http
      healthChecks:
        - $(ref.app-health-check.selfLink)
      backends:
        - group: $(ref.app-instance-group.instanceGroup)
      loadBalancingScheme: EXTERNAL

  - name: app-instance-group
    type: compute.v1.instanceGroupManager
    properties:
      baseInstanceName: app
      instanceTemplate: $(ref.app-instance-template.selfLink)
      targetSize: 2
      zone: us-central1-a

  - name: app-url-map
    type: compute.v1.urlMap
    properties:
      defaultService: $(ref.app-backend-service.selfLink)

  - name: app-http-proxy
    type: compute.v1.targetHttpProxy
    properties:
      urlMap: $(ref.app-url-map.selfLink)

  - name: app-forwarding-rule
    type: compute.v1.globalForwardingRule
    properties:
      target: $(ref.app-http-proxy.selfLink)
      portRange: 80
      loadBalancingScheme: EXTERNAL

outputs:
  - name: network
    value: $(ref.app-network.selfLink)
  - name: bucket
    value: $(ref.app-storage-bucket.selfLink)
  - name: sqlInstance
    value: $(ref.app-sql-instance.connectionName)
  - name: loadBalancerIP
    value: $(ref.app-forwarding-rule.IPAddress)
